top_signals.title: Oil prices jump after Iran missiles threaten fragile ceasefire
top_signals.summary: Traders worry that new strikes could escalate into a return to all-out conflict in Middle East
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says Netanyahu will have ‘no choice’ but to accept a deal with Iran
top_signals.summary: US president tells FT that he ‘calls the shots’ after urging the Israeli leader not to retaliate against Tehran
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Saudi Arabia Slashes Oil Prices Again as Asian Demand Weakens
top_signals.summary: Saudi Arabia has slashed the official selling prices of its crude loading in July to customers in Asia, Europe, and the United States, in a widely expected second consecutive monthly cut amid weakening demand and narrowing spot Middle East crude premiums.   Saudi oil giant Aramco has reduced the price of its flagship Arab Light crude loading for Asia in July by $6 per barrel, setting it at a premium of $9.50 per barrel over the average Oman/Dubai prices, the benchmark for Middle East oil, a pricing document seen by Reuters and Bloomberg showed…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Balfour Beatty emerges from US oversight scheme after fraud against military
top_signals.summary: There was a “landmark moment” for FTSE 250 firm Balfour Beatty on Monday, with the announcement that its US subsidiary emerged from special scrutiny from the Department of Justice. The news came as both a reminder of the global reach of London’s major support services sector and the pitfalls it can face from complex, varied [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
